nodes.label: A Zettelkasten is a system for thinking and writing
nodes.tooltip: A Zettelkasten is a system for thinking and writing

nodes.label: The Zettelkasten is a bottom-up note-taking system
nodes.tooltip: The Zettelkasten is a bottom-up note-taking system

nodes.label: A main note is a self-contained unit of information
nodes.tooltip: A main note is a self-contained unit of information

nodes.label: Titles in a Zettelkasten should be declarative
nodes.tooltip: Titles in a Zettelkasten should be declarative

nodes.label: A fleeting note is any idea important enough to capture in the moment

nodes.label: A browser is an application that retrieves and renders web content for users
nodes.tooltip: A browser is an application that retrieves and renders web content for users

nodes.label: The atomicity-complexity tradeoff is the tension between a note's independence and its contextual richness
nodes.tooltip: The atomicity-complexity tradeoff is the tension between a note's independence and its contextual richness

nodes.label: Taking fleeting notes is the first step towards an externalized thinking process
nodes.tooltip: Taking fleeting notes is the first step towards an externalized thinking process

nodes.label: The use of a Zettelkasten does not inherently improve one's ability to write

nodes.label: An array is a data structure that stores elements of the same type sequentially in memory

nodes.label: Backtracking is an algorithmic paradigm that incrementally builds solutions while discarding invalid states
nodes.tooltip: Backtracking is an algorithmic paradigm that incrementally builds solutions while discarding invalid states

nodes.label: An algorithm is a finite set of rules that gives a sequence of operations for solving a specific type of problem

nodes.label: A large language model (LLM) is a type of AI that can recognize and generate text

nodes.label: Artificial intelligence (AI) is the capability of machines to replicate human intelligence

nodes.label: Slovak has four diacritic marks
nodes.tooltip: Slovak has four diacritic marks

nodes.label: The Slovak alphabet has more letters than the English alphabet

nodes.label: Slovak nouns decline across seven cases

nodes.label: A backend developer works with the server-side of an application

nodes.label: The internet is a network of computers communicating through a set of protocols
nodes.tooltip: The internet is a network of computers communicating through a set of protocols

nodes.label: An interface note is a tool to help navigate trains of thought

nodes.label: The Zettelkasten is informed by what currently interests you

nodes.label: Ideas are not software
